name: Melitzanosalata (Eggplant Salad)
recipeIngredient: Olive oil, 1 cup or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the eggplants and place them in a pan or wrap in foil, then bake until soft.
2. Soak the onions in cold water to remove some of their sharpness.
3. Remove the skins from the cooked eggplant and mash the pulp thoroughly.
4. Drain the onion well and add it to the mashed eggplant.
5. Add salt and pepper, and beat the mixture.
6. Gradually add lemon juice or vinegar alternately with olive oil, beating continuously until you have a thick mixture.
7. Serve in a bowl or as a side dish.
